passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. 1-4): Read the following information carefully and answer the questions given below. P > Q means P is the father of Q P = Q means P is the mother of Q P - Q means P is the brother of Q P × Q means P is the sister of Q

Directions (Q. 5-6): Read the following information to answer these questions. (i) A∩B means A is mother of B. (ii) A©B means A is sister of B. (iii) A*B means A is father of B. (iv) A⊕B means A is brother of B.

Directions (Q. 7-12): Read the following information carefully and then answer the questions given below. ∩A⊕B means A is mother of B. ii) A*B means A is sister of B iii) A*B means A is father of B iv) A⊕B means A is brother of B.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If A + B = C - D, then A is D's

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If A × B = C - D + E, which of the following is A in E's

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following shows that A is the aunt of E?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: A ∩ Q is son of P and P © Q means P is brother of Q, P ⊕ Q means P is sister of P, and P © Q means P is the brother of Q. Which of the following definitely TRUE about N × K - M + L?

choices.a: K is father of L and M.
choices.b: L is the daughter of K and is the niece of her uncle N.
choices.c: K is the father of M and L - his son and daughter respectively.
choices.d: M is the uncle of K's brother N.

questions.body: Which of the following means R is grandfather of Q?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: A⊕B means A is mother of B. ii) A*B means A is sister of B iii) A*B means A is father of B iv) A⊕B means A is brother of B

choices.a: A⊕B means A is mother of B.
choices.b: A*B means A is sister of B.
choices.c: A*B means A is father of B
choices.d: A⊕B means A is brother of B.
